sentences.text: Thanks for joining, Jane. I wanted to check in on how onboarding is going for your team.
Honestly, we're seeing about 40% of our users drop off at the profile setup step. It asks for too much information upfront.
Also, the password reset deep links aren't working on our Android 14 devices. That's a blocker for our rollout.

We're actually redesigning the entire onboarding flow right now — Jira DEV-42. The new design in Figma has a skip option for non-essential fields. And the Android deep link bug is DEV-34, Carlos has a fix in PR #190.
That's good to hear. When can we expect the new onboarding? We have a rollout deadline end of March.
Design review is March 11, and Alice has the implementation in PR #189. We're targeting v2.2.0 for end of March. I'll share the Figma designs with you for early feedback.
